title: waltheria selloana
intro: Waltheria selloana, also known as the Waltheria plant, is a tropical plant native to the Americas, belonging to the family Malvaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Waltheria selloana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations also using the plant's leaves and roots to create medicinal remedies.
